name: Slice and Bake Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. BEFORE BAKING, SPRINKLE WITH GRANULATED SUGAR (IF DESIRED).
CUT FOUR 14X12-INCH PIECES OF WAXED PAPER OR PLASTIC WRAP; SET ASIDE.
2. IN A LARGE BOWL, CREAM MARGARINE AND SUGAR UNTIL LIGHT AND FLOURY.
3. BEAT IN EGGS, VANILLA EXTRACT, AND LEMON EXTRACT UNTIL WELL COMBINED.
4. IN A SEPARATE BOWL, COMBINE FLOUR AND BAKING SODA.
5. GRADUALLY STIR THE FLOUR MIXTURE INTO THE EGG Mixture UNTIL BLEND.
6. DIVIDE THE DOUGH INTO FOUR EQUAL PIECES.
7. SHAPE EACH PIECE INTO AN 8-TO-10-INCH ROLL.
8. WRAP EACH ROLL IN ONE PIECE OF WAXED PAPER OR PLASTIC WRAP.
9. PLACE THE WRAPPED ROLES IN A PLASTIC FREE FREEZER CONTAINER WITH A TIGHT FITTING LID, OR WRAP AIR-TIGHT IN A 14X12 PIECE OF HEAVY DUTY FOIL; LABEL.
10. STORE IN THE FREEZER. USE WITHIN 6 MONTHS.
TO BAKE:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 350°F.
2. LIGHTLY GREASE TWO LARGE BAKING SHEETS.
3. CUT FROZEN DOUGH INTO 1/4-INCH THICK SLICES.
4. PLACE THE SLICES ON THE BAKING SHEETS, ABOUT 1/2 INCH APART.
5. BAKE FOR 8 TO 10 MINUTES OR UNTIL EDGES BECOME SLIGHTLY BROWN.
